summary: A Fox News 'Ingraham Angle' television segment (guest-hosted by Jason Chaffetz) interviewing DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin, with a chyron 'DHS ON THE GROUND IN MINNEAPOLIS' and split-screen B-roll of agents at a Minneapolis door. This is a recorded cable-news interview, not produced entertainment content.
notable_text: TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN DHS ASSISTANT SECRETARY; DHS ON THE GROUND IN MINNEAPOLIS; THE INGRAHAM ANGLE; FOX NEWS
